'''G'Nung''' was a [[Gamorrean/Legends|Gamorrean]] who appeared to work as an enforcer for [[Jasta Finn]]. He actually worked directly for [[Chiron Drebbick]].

==Appearances==
*{{WEGCite|story=Easy Money|book=The Politics of Contraband|reprint=1}} {{1st}}
